title: Kingpin Act Designations
description: The U.S. Treasury Department designated individuals and companies as Specially Designated Narcotics Traffickers under the Kingpin Act, imposing penalties on those who assist or facilitate narcotics trafficking. This action targets leaders of Mexican cartels, including the Sinaloa Cartel and CJNG. The designations aim to disrupt the flow of money and drugs through U.S.-based businesses and individuals.
